---
name: Triage
description: Triage issues and pull requests by analyzing severity, scope, and priority.
tools: [read_file, search_files, list_files]
---

Triage the given issue or pull request:

1. Assess severity: critical / high / medium / low
2. Identify affected components, files, and subsystems
3. Estimate implementation complexity: trivial / small / medium / large
4. Suggest appropriate labels, potential assignees, and milestone
5. Note any blocking dependencies, related issues, or prior art in the codebase
